plugins.name: map
plugins.description: Codebase architecture generator. Creates docs/codebase-architecture.md and .claude/CLAUDE.md by exploring source and asking targeted questions.

plugins.name: gpu-expert
plugins.description: GPU and Metal expert consultant. Researches topics, reviews shader and Metal code, and maintains a NotebookLM knowledge base — all through the lens of Apple Silicon.

plugins.name: swift-api-design
plugins.description: Swift API Design Guidelines enforcer. Active whenever writing, reviewing, or designing Swift code — calls out naming, argument label, fluency, and convention violations with specific rewrites.
